subject: Question about [Company]
body:
Hi [Name],

I was impressed by the work [Company] is doing in the real estate sector. I am building an AI-powered lead generation and outreach tool specifically for professionals like you.

I've actually used my own tool to find your contact info as a decision-maker at [Company]. I'd love to show you how this can help your team automate lead sourcing.

Are you available for a quick chat next week?

Best regards,
Hanzala Kamran
